content:
Did you want more Claude on Cloud? Well, look no further. We have something for you happening today (6/24) at 10:00 AM PT.

Building autonomous agents that can take actions across systems and make decisions without manual human review is incredibly powerful—but it also creates a real challenge for security and IT teams. How do you enforce what an agent is allowed to do? How do you trace and audit its actions?

Join us today for a deep-dive technical session with Roy Arsan (Applied AI @ Anthropic) and Ivan Nardini (Developer Relations Engineer @ Google Cloud) where we'll solve exactly that. We'll be building Claude agents in production using the Claude Agent SDK and showing you how to secure and monitor them at scale.

🛠️ What we're covering:

• Identity & Access Management: Giving each agent a scoped identity and enforcing per-agent and per-user policies using Agent Identity, Cloud IAM, and Agent Gateway.

• Runtime Protection: Using Model Armor to detect and block prompt injection, tool poisoning, and data leakage on the fly.

• Observability: Emitting OpenTelemetry traces and audit events into Google Cloud Observability via the Anthropic Agent SDK, and using permission layers to enforce policy on every tool call.

If you're building agentic workflows with LLMs on Google Cloud, you won't want to miss this one.

👉 Register and join us live!

See you at 10 AM PT! 🚀
